settings.title: Create Shopify Forms form
settings.text: Create a Shopify Forms form named Marketplace Enquiry. Match the fields used on the storefront enquiry form: lead type, interest type, listing, budget range, timeline, private information request, preferred next step, and message.

settings.title: Create Shopify Flow workflows
settings.text: Use the Marketplace Flow Recipe custom data records as the build guide for the Flow workflows. Start with the base form intake flow, then add tag-based routing flows.

settings.title: Test the lead path
settings.text: Submit a test enquiry, confirm the customer is created or updated, confirm tags and metafields are populated, then confirm the customer appears in the right segment.

settings.heading: Marketplace automation setup
settings.text: This internal page documents the Shopify Forms and Shopify Flow setup required to automate marketplace enquiries into customer tags, metafields, segments, and admin follow-up.

settings.title: Base Form Intake
settings.description: Create/update customer, apply workflow tags, set metafields.

settings.title: Tag Routing
settings.description: Route buyer, seller, BIAB, asset sale, access request, and custom build leads.

settings.title: Paid Step Routing
settings.description: Tag customers after deposits, review packs, BIAB, or asset-sale purchases.

settings.heading: Automation recipes stored in Shopify custom data
settings.text: Seven Marketplace Flow Recipe records have been created in Shopify custom data. Use them as the configuration source when creating Shopify Flow workflows.
